But since the code only provides a connection method, the risk is minimal.\n\n### Final assessment:\n- **Malware score:** Should remain at 0.\n- **Obfuscated score:** Should remain at 0.\n- **Risk score:** Given the nature of the code, a score of 0.1 is acceptable; it could be even lower, but it's reasonable.\n\n---\n\n### Overall conclusion:\nThis code is a standard, autogenerated Ethereum smart contract factory.
